name: Catch Reindeer
description: Catch Reindeer is a fun game set in the Christmas atmosphere, where you control Santa Claus chasing and catching mischievous reindeer. Move skillfully, choose the right direction, and catch as many reindeer as possible to score high. The fast pace, simple yet engaging gameplay offers a light-hearted and colorful festive entertainment experience.
instructions: A D or Arrow Left Right mdash move left right Space W Arrow Up mdash jump
